'''Station 3''' was a [[Space station/Legends|space station]] on the [[Sisar Run/Legends|Sisar Run]] between [[Sriluur/Legends|Sriluur]] and [[Terman Station]]. It was mostly destroyed in a [[Battle of Station 3|battle]] between the [[Disac pirates]] and the [[Ghilron pirates]], leaving it as an empty shell of a refueling station.

{{Station-stub}}
